items.prompt: Should a person spend their bonus on current family needs instead of putting it all into retirement savings?

ChatGPT.reasoning: Spending a bonus on current family needs can be justified if those needs are urgent or essential, but balancing some amount for retirement savings is important for long-term financial security. Prioritizing depends on individual circumstances.

items.prompt: Should a person spend their bonus on current family needs instead of putting it all into retirement savings?
